name: I'll Go fer Scissors. How 'Bout You?

2110911.name: I'll Go fer Scissors. How 'Bout You?

descs.desc:
On Unopposed Attack: Does not activate this skill's [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] effects
[WinDuel] Consume Envy E.G.O resource by Envy Reson., and for every Envy E.G.O resource consumed, gain 1 E.G.O resource each for the least-owned Affinities (max consumable Envy resource: 4)
[DefeatDuel] Final Power -4 and gain Shield equal to (Envy Reson. x 5) (max 20)
coinDescs:
[SuperCoin]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Heal 2 allies with the lowest HP percentage by 6% of their max HP (once per Skill)
- Ignores allies without Envy Affinity Base Attack Skills when choosing targets for healing (excluding this unit)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [NiddleEGO]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [NailPersonality]

[DefeatDuel] Final Power -4 and gain Shield equal to (Envy Reson. x 5) (max 25)

[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] Heal 2 allies with the lowest HP percentage by 8% of their max HP (once per Skill)
- Ignores allies without Envy Affinity Base Attack Skills when choosing targets for healing (excluding this unit)
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 2 [NiddleEGO]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [Curse]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 1 [NailPersonality]

- Ignores allies without Envy Affinity Base Attack Skills when choosing targets for healing (excluding this unit)

descs.desc:

Targets randomly
At 2+ Envy Reson., Final Power +1
[WinDuel] Atk Weight +1 for every 2 Envy Reson. (max 2)
[DefeatDuel] Gain Shield equal to (Envy Reson. x 5) (max 20)
[DefeatDuel] This Skill inflicts +1 more [NiddleEGO] and [NailPersonality]

[DefeatDuel] This Skill inflicts +1 more [NiddleEGO], [Curse], and [NailPersonality]

2110911.name: Loser's Penalty: Voodoo
2110911.desc:
On Clash Win, deal 4 Envy damage to target
- At less than 33% HP, or if target has less than 33% HP, inflict 1 [ResultReduction] next turn (once per turn)
- This Passive's effect does not inflict [ResultReduction] in the same turn the E.G.O Gift Voodoo Doll activated
